name: query_space_01f1698b36c71285859d95e937f997f7
description:
Query the Bakehouse Sales Starter Space genie space for data insights.
You can ask natural language questions and will receive responses in natural language or as SQL query results.
You can ask for a summary of the datasets in the genie space to get an overview of the data available.
By default, each query is standalone. Optionally, provide a conversation_id to continue an existing conversation.
If you do not have a conversation_id, please provide all relevant context in the query.
The response will include the conversation_id, message_id, and status of the message in the genie space.
If the message is not complete, use poll_response_01f1698b36c71285859d95e937f997f7 with the returned conversation_id and message_id to poll until the message reaches a completed state.
The genie space description is as follows:
Genie Space description: Welcome to AI/BI Genie, powered by the fictional bakery sales and inventory data. Here, you can ask natural language questions to uncover insights, review trends, and analyze performance.

conversation_id.description: Optional conversation ID to continue an existing conversation

name: poll_response_01f1698b36c71285859d95e937f997f7
description:
Poll for the response of a previously initiated message in the Bakehouse Sales Starter Space genie space.
Use this tool to retrieve results for a message that was started but not yet completed.
Requires both conversation_id and message_id returned from the initial query_space_01f1698b36c71285859d95e937f997f7 tool call.
Please continue polling with this tool until the message reaches a completed state.

conversation_id.description: The conversation ID from the genie space

message_id.description: The message ID to poll for the response of
